title: QPU Datashard Envelope v1
description: Tier-0 NDJSON envelope for cross-repo QPU datashards. Each shard is one self-contained line that encodes invariants, metrics, safety/entitlement, routing, and payload references only. No raw BCI, trauma, PII, or narrative payloads are allowed.

schema.description: Canonical schema URI for this QPU datashard envelope.

shard_id.description: Stable identifier for this shard within the constellation.

shard_kind.description: Logical kind of shard; used by orchestrators and tools for routing.

schemaref.description: Reference to the primary contract schema implemented by this shard (e.g., personacontractv1.json).

repo_tier.description: VM-Constellation tier of the emitting repo.

repo_name.description: Canonical repository name (e.g., Horror.Place, HorrorPlace-Atrocity-Seeds, HorrorPlace-Dead-Ledger-Network).

deadledgerref.description: Opaque reference to a Dead-Ledger proof envelope or bundle. Must be an opaque handle; no inline proof material.

safetytier.description: Safety tier associated with this shard (e.g., standard, mature, research).

intensity_band.description: Normalized horror intensity band for this shard.

entitlement_profile_id.description: Identifier of the entitlement profile that governs how this shard may be used.

function_kind.description: Functional role of this shard (e.g., static-contract, bci-swing, telemetry-slice, policy-card).

invariants.description: Local invariant values or expectations for this shard, aligned with the global invariants schema.

dir.description: Qualitative direction for haunt vector (e.g., none, threshold, shore, corridor).

metrics.description: Entertainment metric bands or deltas relevant to this shard, aligned with the global metrics schema.

bci_binding.description: Optional BCI binding metadata for shards that interact with BCI swing functions. Must only contain derived, pre-processed state descriptors, never raw signal streams.

input_signature.description: Identifier for the abstract BCI state summary this shard expects (e.g., bcistate.alpha_theta_windowed_v1).

inputs.description: Names of derived BCI features (e.g., alpha_power_norm, hrv_band).

classification_band.description: Qualitative band of BCI state (e.g., calm, mild-arousal, high-arousal, fatigued).

bcistate_schema.description: Schema reference for the summarized BCI state object consumed here.

zkp.description: Optional ZKP usage metadata, linking this shard to proof types without embedding proofs.

proof_type.description: Dead-Ledger prooftype that can attest correct use of this shard (e.g., bcistate, sessionsafety, bundle_attestation).

required.description: Whether a valid proof of this type is required before this shard may be acted upon.

payload_ref.description: Opaque reference to the primary contract or implementation that this shard summarizes. No raw content or trauma data allowed here.

registry.description: Path or name of the registry file that indexes the payload (e.g., registrypersonas.json).

id.description: Identifier of the payload within its registry.

hash.description: Canonical hash (e.g., sha256-...) of the payload.

path.description: Repository-relative path to the payload file.

orchestrator_profile.description: Hints for orchestrators and CI about cross-tier visibility and NDJSON guarantees.

cross_tier_visible.description: Indicates whether this shard is allowed to cross tiers (e.g., be consumed outside its origin repo).

ndjson_self_contained.description: Must be true; QPU datashards are required to be self-contained per line for cross-repo orchestration.

metricDescriptor.description: Descriptor for a single entertainment metric, expressed as bands and/or deltas. At least one of band, target_band, delta, hard_cap, or max_band must be present.

delta.description: Intended change to this metric (positive, negative, or zero).

hard_cap.description: Hard maximum allowed value for this metric.

band01.description: Closed interval [min, max] for a metric in [0,1].
